title: Department Manager Vacancy at Durian Furniture - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Durian Furniture - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
